name: ox-standard
description: Fast, comprehensive TypeScript/React linting with JavaScript Standard Style philosophy using oxlint
author: Johann Berger <johann@objekt.stream>

scripts.test:setup: npm run build && vitest run setup-test/
scripts.fix: npm run lint; npm run format
scripts.build:
tsc && (printf '#!/usr/bin/env node
'; tail -n +2 dist/setup-oxlint.js) > dist/setup-oxlint.js.tmp && mv dist/setup-oxlint.js.tmp dist/setup-oxlint.js && chmod +x dist/setup-oxlint.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run lint && npx vitest run
